main.description: Record defining a 'teleport', that is active during a certain time.

streamer.description: The DID of the streamer to teleport to.

startsAt.description: The time the teleport becomes active.

durationSeconds.description: The time limit in seconds for the teleport. If not set, the teleport is permanent. Must be at least 60 seconds, and no more than 32,400 seconds (9 hours).
